name: slit-scan-reveal
title: Slit Scan Reveal
description: The frame's rows sample an authored subject at offset times: a canvas painter draws row slices of one pure position function evaluated at t minus offset(row), smearing arrival through time until the offsets collapse to zero and the mark holds coherent.
evidence: Wave M4 experiment slate; classic slit-scan sampling implemented as a closed-form position function drawn in per-slice clips, offsets collapsing at the resolve cue

variables.label: Axis
variables.description: rows smears arrival across horizontal slices; cols across vertical slices.

variables.label: Spread
variables.description: Maximum sampling offset in seconds across the frame; larger smears further through time.

variables.label: Resolve at
variables.description: Seconds from mount start when the offsets start collapsing to zero. Clamped so the collapse and any exit stay inside the clip.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Subject ring and orbit color: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the resolved mark holds until the frame cuts.
